pages.text: To be able to upgrade your advanced armor with abilities or other attributes you have to craft and apply upgrades.$(br)The way you unlock a pattern varies per pattern.
To apply an upgrade on your advanced armor you have to place your armor inside the upgrade station and surround it with the chosen upgrades.
Craftable by putting a $(l:myneheroes:items)circuit board$(/l)$(br)Helmet upgrade.$(br2)Adds a HUD to the first person when activated.
Wearing armor with this upgrade lowers the amount of damage you take from radiation by 25% each.
3 extra storage slots.$(br2)Note:$(br)Can be worn as leggings.
4 extra storage slots.$(br2)Note:$(br)Can be worn as leggings.$(br)Be careful when crafting, all items in the original toolbelt will be lost
6 extra storage slots.$(br2)Note:$(br)Can be worn as leggings.$(br)Be careful when crafting, all items in the original toolbelt will be lost
8 extra storage slots.$(br2)Note:$(br)Can be worn as leggings.$(br)Be careful when crafting, all items in the original toolbelt will be lost
